creator: grahamperrin@gmail.com
text:
Outdated, but not detectably so with portscout at <https://portscout.freebsd.org/arrowd@freebsd.org.html>. 

Maintainer @rrowd has been pinged in FreeBSD Discord at <https://discord.com/channels/727023752348434432/1302725893076156507>.

With Chromium on FreeBSD 15.0-CURRENT, <https://bitmovin.com/demos/drm/> responds: 

> License request failed
> 
> (DRM_FAILED_LICENSE_REQUEST)
